items.briefing:
The recent Canvas data breach has raised important questions for Australian organisations about ransomware — specifically, whether paying a ransom actually protects stolen data. Security experts caution that paying does not guarantee data deletion or prevent further misuse, and it may encourage further attacks. Meanwhile, global compliance fines rose sharply in early 2026, a reminder that mishandling personal data carries real financial and legal consequences for training organisations holding student records.

Scammers continue targeting individuals through increasingly convincing methods, including impersonation. Routine processes like emails, login prompts, and file sharing — the "boring" everyday tasks — are now primary attack entry points.

**Tip:** Remind staff never to click unexpected password reset or login links — always go directly to the website instead.
